notes: This file contains manually curated Korean history reference pilot rows.
These rows are supporting references only.
They are not biblical events and must not be used as a basis for biblical interpretation.
No Bible text is stored here.
No coordinates or map-provider data are stored here.
This file now feeds a collapsed supporting-reference preview in the Timeline Events view only.
These rows are not counted as biblical events and do not drive the Scripture Evidence Panel.

dateBasisLabel.en: Approximate period / Source-attested period / Reference only

cautionNote.ko: 이 row는 성경 정경 사건과 직접 대응하지 않는 후대 보조 참조이며 성경 해석 근거 아님. 한국사 자체를 성경 연대 증명에 사용하지 않는다.
cautionNote.en: This row is a later supporting reference and not a basis for biblical interpretation. It does not directly correspond to biblical-canon events and must not be used to prove biblical chronology.

note.ko: 삼국 형성기는 성경 정경 사건 바깥의 후대 한국사 배경으로만 다루며, 보조 참조 레이어에 한정한다.
note.en: The formation of the Three Kingdoms is treated only as later Korean historical background outside biblical-canon event authority and is confined to the supporting-reference layer.
